free_text: Nuclear reactions of low-z elements with 5.7-BeV
protons
Various targets were bombarded as foils or powder.
foils stacks consisted of target foils, guard foils,
and monitor foils all aligned and taped together.
samples were metal of aluminium, anhydrous Na2CO3
compound holder for sodium, teflon foil for fluorine,
anhydrous oxalic acid for oxygen, anhydrous 5-amino
tetrazole for nitrogen, polyethylene foils for carbon,
and beryllium foil.
Losses of activities from powder targets and
contributions from secondary reactions were considered.
Overall uncertainty includes random error, systematic
error and monitor cross-section error.
Data taken from Phys.Rev.,119,316(1960),Tbl. I.
Converted to lower case.
